description: Goal: ActivationKey.input becomes identity only; body input evidence comes from a separate ActivationInputs fact backed by caller-owned contributions. Signal: semantic tests prove recursive key collapse no longer erases the raw caller evidence that AnalyzeActivation uses, and stale caller contributions retract when a caller reruns without them. Strategy: add FactKey::ActivationInputs, add a World-owned activation-input contribution store with publisher replacement semantics, have SeedRoot and AnalyzeActivation publish input contributions, and make AnalyzeActivation wait/read ActivationInputs instead of reading ActivationKey.input.
title: Compiler2 semantics: split activation demand from activation input evidence
